form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, 7th of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 6 len behind Plutarque with 56kg at $44. Better for that run and can do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Was at long odds at debut, 7th of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 6 len behind Plutarque with 56kg at $44. Better for that run and can do much better.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, 5th of 7 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on January 12 over 1500m, slow going 7 len behind Weeken carrying 58kg at $4.40. Second-up 9th of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 8 len behind Plutarque carrying 58kg at $3.20. Has ability and can get off the mark this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, 5th of 7 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on January 12 over 1500m, slow going 7 len behind Weeken carrying 58kg at $4.40. Second-up 9th of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 8 len behind Plutarque carrying 58kg at $3.20. Has ability and can get off the mark this time.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At very big odds at debut, eased back early on 8th of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 7 len behind Plutarque carrying 56kg at $60. Second-up raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 8 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1900m, 1.75 len behind Micocoulier carrying 54.5kg at $30. Improver who is worth including.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Lining up for just third start. Second-up raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 8 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1900m, 1.75 len behind Micocoulier carrying 54.5kg at $30. Improver who is worth including.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, ran last of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 8 len behind Easy As Pie carrying 55.5kg at $37. Doubt he will trouble these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Jumped at big odds at debut, ran last of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 8 len behind Easy As Pie carrying 55.5kg at $37. Doubt he will trouble these.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 7th of 9 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 2000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Fel with 56.5kg at $22. Last start 3rd of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 2000m, 2.75 len behind Aleksandrovka carrying 58kg at $6.40. May need one more.

formComments.title: TAB

Last start 3rd of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 2000m, 2.75 len behind Aleksandrovka carrying 58kg at $6.40. May need one more.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Easy As Pie with 58kg at $3.80. Better for that experience; top chance.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Was well-supported at debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Easy As Pie with 58kg at $3.80. Better for that experience; top chance.

form.formComment: First-starter by Dariyan out of Kinetix. Watch for any market moves.
